title: Rafa's Been There
description: Present Perfect with EVER / NEVER / BEEN. Rafa tells the class every country he's been to — and which one he's never visited.
summary_pt_br: Present Perfect (have/has + particípio) para experiências de vida. Key words: EVER (já, em perguntas), NEVER (nunca), BEEN (esteve em), GONE (foi e não voltou).

scenes.subtitle_pt: Experiência de vida em Present Perfect

scenes.text_en:
'I HAVE BEEN to twelve countries,' Rafa said.
'I HAVE EATEN tacos in Mexico, pizza in Naples, sushi in Tokyo.
I HAVE NEVER BEEN to Orlando — but I'm GOING.
I HAVE NEVER SEEN a bigger ambition than my own.'
scenes.text_pt:
'Já ESTIVE em doze países,' disse o Rafa.
'Já COMI taco no México, pizza em Nápoles, sushi em Tóquio.
NUNCA ESTIVE em Orlando — mas vou.
Nunca VI ambição maior que a minha.'

scenes.title: Present Perfect for life experience
scenes.body_en: Structure: HAVE / HAS + past participle. Use for experiences up to now, without a specific time. Signal words: EVER ('Have you EVER…?'), NEVER ('I have NEVER…'). With places, use BEEN (go-and-come-back) not GONE (went and hasn't come back). 'She HAS BEEN to Paris' (she visited). 'She HAS GONE to Paris' (she's there now).
scenes.body_pt: Estrutura: have/has + particípio. Experiência até agora, sem tempo específico. EVER = já (em pergunta), NEVER = nunca. BEEN = foi e voltou. GONE = foi e não voltou. 'Has been to Paris' (visitou). 'Has gone to Paris' (ainda lá).

examples.en: Maya has been to Hawaii. (she came back)
Maya has gone to Hawaii. (she's there now)
examples.pt: Maya foi para o Havaí (ainda está lá).

exercise.question: Complete: '___ you ever ___ (try) Brazilian feijoada?'
exercise.explanation: Yes/no question in present perfect: HAVE you ever + past participle (tried).

exercise.question: Maya is in Rio right now. Which is correct?
options: Both A and B depending on meaning
exercise.explanation: She's THERE now → GONE. BEEN means she visited and returned.
exercise.hint_pt_br: Está lá agora = gone. Já visitou e voltou = been.

exercise.question: Complete: 'I have ___ (never) eaten escargot.'
exercise.explanation: NEVER in affirmative structure with present perfect.
exercise.hint_pt_br: NEVER no lugar do 'not' em present perfect.

turns.en: Have you ever been to Hawaii?
Not yet. But I will. One day.
turns.pt: Ainda não. Mas vou. Um dia.

exercise.explanation: Five key signals for Present Perfect. Learn them together.

exercise.question: Complete: "Yes, I have been ___ twice."
exercise.explanation: The full phrase is: "Yes, I have been there twice."

exercise.question: Pick the best response. ('Comi vários tipos.')
options: Yes, I have tried many kinds.
exercise.explanation: The correct response is: "Yes, I have tried many kinds."

scenes.title: Rafa's past travels
scenes.pt_summary: Present perfect — Have you ever been to...?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Have you ever been to Mexico?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, I have been there twice.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Have you tried real Mexican tacos?
turns.pt: Já comeu taco mexicano de verdade?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, I have tried many kinds.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: I have been to Argentina but not to Mexico.
turns.pt: Fui pra Argentina mas não México.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Have you ever eaten in Buenos Aires?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Yes, I have eaten the best steak there.
turns.pt: Já comi o melhor bife lá.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Have you ever seen the ocean in winter?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Yes, I have. It was amazing.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I have never seen snow in my life.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: You should visit Argentina with me!
turns.pt: Tem que vir pra Argentina comigo!

scenes.title: Listening story — Rafa's Been There
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça a situação com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que você entendeu — resumo, detalhes, seus pensamentos. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Write in English what you heard. A short summary is fine. Mention who spoke, what they said, and what you think about the situation.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que você ouviu. Pode ser um resumo curto. Diga quem falou, o que disseram e o que você achou.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: In this story, we meet Rafa and a student. Present Perfect with EVER / NEVER / BEEN. Rafa tells the class every country he's been to — and which one he's never visited. Listen carefully and think about what each person says.

paragraphs.speaker: Rafa
paragraphs.en: Have you ever been to Mexico?

paragraphs.speaker: The student
paragraphs.en: Yes, I have been there twice.

paragraphs.speaker: Rafa
paragraphs.en: Have you tried real Mexican tacos?

paragraphs.speaker: The student
paragraphs.en: Yes, I have tried many kinds.

paragraphs.speaker: Rafa
paragraphs.en: I have been to Argentina but not to Mexico.

paragraphs.speaker: The student
paragraphs.en: Have you ever eaten in Buenos Aires?

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: That is the end of our short scene with Rafa. Think about what you heard and how the conversation felt.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "Rafa's Been There". Present Perfect with EVER / NEVER / BEEN. Rafa tells the class every country he's been to — and which one he's never visited. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up. The ocean in Praia do Sol keeps moving, and so does your English.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: A chave é a prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever seus próprios exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "Rafa's Been There". I liked it because it was clear and short. Tomorrow we will practice again. See you then!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule about the past
check.explanation: She says: "Today in class we studied 'Rafa's Been There'".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala claramente o título: "Rafa's Been There".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para você estudar mais. Salve os links e volte sempre.

sources.label: British Council · A2
sources.pt_hint: Leituras A2 com exercícios de compreensão.

sources.label: VOA Learning English · Everyday Grammar
sources.pt_hint: Vídeos curtos sobre gramática do dia a dia.
